headline: How The Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Story Is Shifting With AI And Analyst Revisions
summary: Analysts have adjusted price targets for Illinois Tool Works, with bullish cases moving up by US$5 to US$35, while the model fair value estimate remains at US$280.88. These shifts align with new research that highlights both confidence in the high margin hardware footprint and debate over how AI driven automation could influence returns in that business. Below, you will see how to track these updates and interpret what the evolving analyst narrative may mean for your own view on the...
